adds.rationale: Closes the obvious hyperscaler gap in the watchlist: AWS is the third pillar of the AI-infrastructure buildout alongside MSFT-Azure and GOOGL-GCP, and Amazon just completed its $4B Anthropic investment on March 27, 2024, locking Anthropic to AWS Trainium/Inferentia and Bedrock.

news_evidence.summary: Amazon completes $4B Anthropic investment; Anthropic commits to AWS Trainium/Inferentia for training and Bedrock for distribution
Nvidia GTC keynote unveils Blackwell GB200; AWS named among cloud partners committing to Blackwell instances later in 2024, reinforcing AWS's AI-infra trajectory

removes.rationale: Most redundant healthcare exposure on the list now that LLY (GLP-1 leader, $2B Mounjaro+Zepbound in Q1 2024) carries the aging-demographics thesis and ISRG covers medical robotics; XLV is a broad sector ETF that dilutes both signals and frees a slot under the 16-cap for the missing AI hyperscaler.

news_evidence.summary: Eli Lilly's Mounjaro and Zepbound combined for ~$2B in Q1 2024, anchoring the GLP-1 leg of the demographics thesis without needing XLV's broad-sector dilution

rationale_overall: One targeted swap at the 16-cap: add AMZN to plug the AWS-shaped hole in the AI mega-cap exposure (the Anthropic-on-AWS deal closed March 27 makes this concrete), and drop XLV since LLY and ISRG already carry the demographics and medical-robotics legs of the healthcare thesis more sharply than a broad sector ETF. Net thematic shape is unchanged on nuclear (URA, CCJ), rockets (RKLB), robotics (BOTZ), quantum (IONQ), defense (ITA), and energy/LNG (LNG, XLE); AI breadth improves from 4 to 5 mega-caps.
